recommendations.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
recommendations.overview: After the disastrous food storm in the first film, Flint and his friends are forced to leave the town. Flint accepts the invitation from his idol Chester V to join The Live Corp Company, which has been tasked to clean the island, and where the best i

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: Migration
recommendations.overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung places, the Mallard family embarks on a family road trip, from New England, to New York City, to tropical Jamaica.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Big Top Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and the gang hear of a werewolf plaguing a traveling circus, they go undercover as circus performers to get to the bottom.

recommendations.title: Dumbo
recommendations.overview: A young elephant, whose oversized ears enable him to fly, helps save a struggling circus, but when the circus plans a new venture, Dumbo and his friends discover dark secrets beneath its shiny veneer.

recommendations.title: Animal Crackers
recommendations.overview: A family must use a magical box of Animal Crackers to save a rundown circus from being taken over by their evil uncle Horatio P. Huntington.
recommendations.director: Tony Bancroft, Scott Christian Sava, Jaime Maestro

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

recommendations.title: Shrek in the Swamp Karaoke Dance Party
recommendations.overview: Shrek and his friends enjoy themselves with some Karaoke partying.

recommendations.title: Queens on the Run
recommendations.overview: When four women finally take the road trip they planned in high school, they have no idea of the things they'll bump into... sometimes literally.
